flows: calendarioutente -> evento — type=has; label="aggiungi"; explanation="calendarioutente ha eventi"
calendarioutente -> stagione — type=has; label="stagione"; explanation="calendarioutente ha una stagione"

calendarioutente -> database — type=usa; label="disconnetti"; explanation="calendarioutente si disconnette dal database"
sistema interfaccia utente -> calendarioutente: aggiungievento(evento)
calendarioutente -> database: eseguiquery(query)
database -> calendarioutente: resultset
the diagram models a system for managing events and their scheduling within a user's calendar.
the system utilizes a database to store event information.
the user interface allows adding, modifying, and deleting events.
the system associates events with a specific season and regulation.

the diagram models the sequence of actions involved in user authentication and registration.
the flow includes checking if the user is already logged in, registering a new user, and retrieving the current user from firebase auth.
the diagram highlights the interaction between the application, the data management system, and firebase auth.
applicazione -> sistema di segnalazioni: forward(getsegnalazioni());
sistema di segnalazioni -> sistema di gestione dei dati: forward(payload);
sistema di gestione dei dati -> database: query(select segnalazioni());
database -> sistema di gestione dei dati: payload
sistema di gestione dei dati -> applicazione: display(list(list));
applicazione -> sistema di segnalazioni: getsegnalazioni();
the application requests a list of signals from the signaling system.
the signaling system forwards a payload to the data management system.
the data management system queries the database for signals.
the database returns the signals as a payload.
the data management system displays the list of signals to the application.
applicazione -> sistema gestione variazioni: train_variations(getvariationen)
sistema gestione variazioni -> sistema gestione dati: list_pref_train (getpreftrend())
sistema gestione dati -> database: gettrendinfo(train.code)
database -> api trenitalia: gettrendinfo(train.code)
the application initiates the process by requesting train variations.
the data management system retrieves train preferences.
the database retrieves train information, likely for comparison or validation.
the api (trenitalia) is used to fetch train information, potentially for external data.
the loop suggests a mechanism to detect and handle changes in train information.
applicazione -> sistema gestione calendario — message=setcalendarico(cal); label="setcalendarico(cal)"; explanation="application calls setcalendarico(cal)"

sistema gestione calendario -> sistema di gestione dei dati — message=forward(setcalendarico(cal)); label="forward(setcalendarico(cal))"; explanation="system gestione calendario forwards setcalendarico(cal)"
sistema di gestione dei dati -> database — message=query(new calendarico(cal)); label="query(new calendarico(cal))"; explanation="system di gestione dei dati queries a new calendarico(cal)"
sistema di gestione dati -> applicazione — message=forward(outcome); label="forward(outcome)"; explanation="system di gestione dei dati forwards outcome"
sistema gestione calendario -> applicazione — message=display(outcome); label="display(outcome)"; explanation="system gestione calendario displays outcome"
applicazione sends setcalendarico(cal) to sistema gestione calendario.
sistema gestione calendario forwards setcalendarico(cal) to sistema di gestione dei dati.
sistema di gestione dei dati queries a new calendarico(cal) from database.
sistema di gestione dei dati forwards outcome to sistema gestione calendario.
sistema gestione calendario displays outcome to applicazione.
the diagram models the interaction between an application, a calendar management system, a data management system, and a database during a calendar insertion process.
the application initiates the process by calling `setcalendarico(cal)`.
the calendar management system forwards this request to the data management system.
the data management system retrieves a new calendar object from the database.
finally, the calendar management system displays the outcome to the application.

applicazione -> sistema gestione calendario — message=forward(getcalendario()); label="forward(getcalendario())"; explanation="application requests calendar data from the calendar management system.";
sistema gestione calendario -> database — message=query(select calendario(*)); label="query(select calendario(*))"; explanation="calendar management system queries the database for calendar data.";
database -> sistema di gestione dei dati — message=payload; label="payload"; explanation="database returns the calendar data.";

sistema di gestione dei dati -> sistema gestione calendario — message=forward(payload); label="forward(payload)"; explanation="data management system forwards the calendar data to the calendar management system.";
sistema gestione calendario -> applicazione — message=display(calendario); label="display(calendario)"; explanation="calendar management system displays the calendar data to the application.";
sistema gestione calendario -> applicazione — message=display(null); label="display(null)"; explanation="calendar management system displays null to the application.";

flow 1: applicazione calls getcalendario() -> sistema gestione calendario forwards(getcalendario()) -> database queries(select calendario(*)) -> database returns payload -> sistema di gestione dei dati forwards(payload) -> sistema gestione calendario displays(calendario) -> applicazione displays(calendario)
the application initiates the process by requesting calendar data.
the calendar management system queries the database for the data.
the data management system forwards the retrieved data to the calendar management system.
the calendar management system then displays the calendar data to the application.
applicazione -> sistema gestione calendario: forward(gettrains(calendario))
sistema gestione calendario -> sistema gestione dei dati: forward(payload)
sistema gestione dei dati -> api trenitalia: requesttrains(calendario)
api trenitalia -> sistema gestione dei dati: payload
api trenitalia -> database: query(newtrnolo[id, info])
sistema gestione dei dati -> applicazione: forward(outcome)
applicazione -> sistema gestione calendario: display(outcome)
the application initiates the cancellation process by requesting train information from the calendar system.
the calendar system retrieves the relevant train data and forwards it to the data management system.
the data management system then communicates with the api trenitalia to initiate the cancellation request, passing the train details.
the api trenitalia queries the database for the train information.
finally, the data management system forwards the outcome of the cancellation to the application, which displays it to the user.
applicazione -> sistema gestione calendario — message=gettrains(calendario); label="gettrains(calendario)"; explanation="application requests train list for a calendar."
sistema gestione calendario -> sistema di gestione dei dati — message=forward(payload); label="forward(payload)"; explanation="system forwards the request to the data system."
sistema di gestione dei dati -> api trenitalia — message=payload; label="payload"; explanation="data system sends the request to the api."
api trenitalia -> database — message=query(deletetrenodi(id)); label="query(deletetrenodi(id))"; explanation="api queries the database to delete a train."
database -> api trenitalia — message=status code; label="status code"; explanation="database returns a status code to the api."
api trenitalia -> sistema di gestione dei dati — message=payload; label="payload"; explanation="api sends the response back to the data system."
sistema di gestione dei dati -> sistema gestione calendario — message=forward(outcome); label="forward(outcome)"; explanation="data system forwards the outcome to the calendar system."
sistema gestione calendario -> applicazione — message=display(outcome); label="display(outcome)"; explanation="calendar system displays the outcome to the application."
flow 1: applicazione -> sistema gestione calendario: gettrains(calendario)
flow 2: sistema gestione calendario -> sistema di gestione dei dati: forward(payload)
flow 3: sistema di gestione dei dati -> api trenitalia: payload
flow 4: api trenitalia -> database: query(deletetrenodi(id))
flow 5: database -> api trenitalia: status code
flow 6: api trenitalia -> sistema di gestione dei dati: payload
flow 7: sistema di gestione dati -> sistema gestione calendario: forward(outcome)
flow 8: sistema gestione calendario -> applicazione: display(outcome)
the application requests a list of trains for a specific calendar.
the system forwards this request to the data system.
the data system queries the database to delete a train.
the database returns a status code to the api.
the api sends the response back to the data system.
the data system forwards the outcome to the calendar system.
the calendar system displays the outcome to the application.
applicazione -> sistema gestione variazioni: getvariazioni();
sistema gestione variazioni -> applicazione: train_variations = res;
applicazione -> sistema di notifica: shownotifica(train_variations);
the application initiates a process by requesting variation data from the system.
the system processes the request and returns the variation data.
the application then displays the received notification.
